info.name: NIB Lersha Integration API
info.description:
API collection for the NIB MicroCredit – Lersha farmer loan integration.

This collection contains all endpoints exposed by NIB for Lersha to consume.

## Flow
1. **Register Farmers** – Send farmer details via `sendFarmerDetail`
2. **Check Account** – Verify if a farmer has a bank account for their phone via `hasAccount` (core-banking lookup)
3. **Get Contract Content** – Fetch the loan contract (T&C) text in the farmer's chosen language for review
4. **Request Contract** – NIB generates a unique **Contract ID** and SMSs it to the farmer
5. **Verify Contract** – Submit the Contract ID to **sign** the contract (status → `SIGNED`)
6. **Request Loan** – Initiate a loan request; **requires a signed contract**, then an OTP is sent to the farmer's phone
7. **Confirm OTP** – Verify the OTP, then NIB **automatically** disburses the loan and notifies Lersha via `POST /api/v1/nib/disbursement-confirmation` with `{ farmer_id, remaing_balance }` (Lersha field name)
8. **Confirm Disbursement** *(optional)* – Manual retry/reconciliation only; not required in the normal flow

## Farmer approval (not an API in this collection)
A farmer must be **approved by an admin on the NIB farmer page** before a loan contract can be issued (step 4) and before any loan can be requested (step 6). Approval is an internal admin action and is intentionally **not** exposed as part of this integration API.

## Loan contract step (steps 3–5)
After a farmer is approved and before a loan can be processed, the multilingual loan contract must be presented and signed. The contract content is the active **Terms & Conditions** configured per language in Admin → Settings → Borrower Agreement (Amharic, Afan Oromo, Tigrigna, Somali, Sidama).

## Lersha callback (server-to-server, not in this collection)
After step 7, NIB calls Lersha:
- `POST {LERSHA_API_BASE_URL}/nib/disbursement-confirmation`
- Body: `{ "farmer_id": "...", "remaing_balance": 50000 }`

## Insurance payment flow
1. **Request Insurance Payment** — Lersha sends a list of `farmerIDs` to `POST /api/v1/nib/insuranceRequest`. For each farmer, NIB resolves the **Insurance** loan purpose captured at registration and records a reviewable insurance payment (status `REQUESTED`).
2. **Admin review (not an API in this collection)** — An admin reviews the requested insurance payments on the NIB portal and approves them **one-by-one or in bulk**. On approval the payment is booked like any other loan purpose (loan + ledger entries, provider fund decrement) and the configured **insurer account** is credited via the core-banking disbursement.
3. **Insurance confirmation callback (server-to-server)** — After approval/rejection, NIB calls Lersha:
   - `POST {LERSHA_API_BASE_URL}/nib/insuranceConfirmation`
   - Body: `{ "requests": [ { "farmer_id": "...", "status": "SUCCESS" | "FAILED", "remaining_balance": 5000, "transaction_id": "TXN...", "transaction_amount": 1500 } ] }`

> The per-insurer account + NIB insurance ID are configured in Admin → Insurance Payments → Insurance Accounts (mapped by the insurer `insurance_name` sent on the farmer's insurance loan purpose).

## Collection Variables
- `base_url` – NIB API base URL (e.g. `http://localhost:3004`)
- `farmer_id` – Set after registration
- `product_id` – Set after registration
- `language_code` – Contract language: `am` | `om` | `ti` | `so` | `sid`
- `contract_code` – Contract ID; auto-set after Request Contract (non-prod), else read from SMS
- `request_id` – Set after loan request
- `otp` – Enter manually from SMS
- `reference_no` – Set after OTP confirmation
- `loan_id` – Set after successful auto-disbursement
- `remaining_balance` – Set after successful auto-disbursement

request.description:
Register one or more farmer details into the NIB system.

The payload is a **JSON array** of farmer objects. Each farmer must include:
- Personal details (name, phone, address)
- Farm information (size, crop type, registry number)
- Documents (kebele ID URL, land certificate URL)
- Loan info (amount, term, repayment source)
- Credit score data
- Emergency contact
- At least one loan purpose item

### Loan Purpose Types
- **Fertilizer / Seed / etc.** — requires `agro_dealer` object with dealer name and account number
- **Insurance** — requires `Insurance` object with `insurance_name`

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Farmer details registered successfully",
  "results": [
    { "farmerId": "FARMER-001", "status": "REGISTERED" }
  ]
}
```

body.raw: [{"farmerId":"FARMER-001","farmerName":"Abebe Kebede","phoneNumber":"+251911000001","kebeleIdDocUrl":"https://docs.example.com/kebele/farmer-001.pdf","landCertificateDocUrl":"https://docs.example.com/land/farmer-001.pdf","totalFarmSizeInHectare":3.5,"cultivatedAreaInHectare":2.0,"primaryCropType":"Wheat","farmRegistryNumber":"FR-2026-001","requestedLoanAmount":50000,"repaymentSource":"Crop Sale","requestedLoanTermInMonth":12,"applicationChannel":"Lersha","creditScoreValue":720,"scoreCalculationDate":"2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z","emergencyContactName":"Almaz Kebede","emergencyContactPhone":"+251911000002","emergencyContactRelationship":"Spouse","emergencyContactAddress":"Addis Ababa, Bole Sub City","status":"PENDING","address":"Oromia, West Shewa Zone","loanPurposes":[{"loanPurpose":"Fertilizer","specificVarietyName":"DAP","quantity":5,"unitOfMeasurement":"Quintal","unitPrice":4500,"totalCost":22500,"agro_dealer":{"agro_dealer_name":"Green Fields Agro","agro_dealer_account_number":"1000123456789"}}]}]

request.description:
Check whether a farmer has a National Bank account linked to their phone number.

Uses the same core-banking lookup as phone–account association in the mini-app (`POST /api/loan-accounts`). If the banking service returns one or more accounts for the phone, `hasAccount` is `true`; otherwise `false`.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type   | Required | Description |
|-----------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `phone`   | string | Yes      | Farmer's phone number (e.g. `+251911000001`) |

### Response – Account Found (200)
```json
{
  "hasAccount": true
}
```

### Response – No Account (200)
```json
{
  "hasAccount": false
}
```

### Response – Banking Service Unavailable (502)
```json
{
  "error": "Unable to verify account with banking service."
}
```

response.name: 502 - Banking Service Error

query.description: am (Amharic) | om (Afan Oromo) | ti (Tigrigna) | so (Somali) | sid (Sidama)

request.description:
Diagram steps 1–2: fetch the active loan contract (Terms & Conditions) text in the farmer's chosen language so the agent can display and review it with the farmer.

The farmer must already be approved by an admin on the NIB farmer page. Falls back to the default content when the requested language has not been configured in Settings.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter       | Type   | Required | Description |
|-----------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `farmer_id`     | string | Yes      | The unique farmer ID |
| `language_code` | string | Yes      | `am` \| `om` \| `ti` \| `so` \| `sid` |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "farmerId": "FARMER-001",
  "languageCode": "om",
  "languageLabel": "Afan Oromo",
  "version": 3,
  "content": "<contract text in Afan Oromo>"
}
```

response.name: 404 - No Active Terms Configured

exec: console.log('No contractCode in response (hidden in production). Read it from the SMS and set the {{contract_code}} variable manually.');

request.description:
Diagram steps 3–4: NIB generates a unique **Contract ID**, snapshots the chosen-language contract, and **sends the Contract ID to the farmer's registered phone via SMS**. The farmer must be `APPROVED` (by an admin on the NIB farmer page).

### Request Body
| Field           | Type   | Required | Description |
|-----------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `farmer_id`     | string | Yes      | The unique farmer ID |
| `language_code` | string | Yes      | `am` \| `om` \| `ti` \| `so` \| `sid` |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Contract ID sent to farmer's registered phone number.",
  "farmerId": "FARMER-001",
  "languageCode": "om",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "smsSent": true,
  "contractCode": "LC-AKX6TU"
}
```

> `contractCode` is returned only outside production (`NODE_ENV !== 'production'`) to ease testing; in production read it from the SMS. The test script auto-saves it to `{{contract_code}}` when present.

### Errors
| Code | Meaning |
|------|--------|
| 403  | Farmer not approved |
| 404  | Farmer not found |
| 409  | No active terms & conditions configured |

response.name: 201 - Contract ID Sent
response.body:
{
  "message": "Contract ID sent to farmer's registered phone number.",
  "farmerId": "FARMER-001",
  "languageCode": "om",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "smsSent": true,
  "contractCode": "LC-AKX6TU"
}

response.name: 403 - Farmer Not Approved
409 - No Active Terms

request.description:
Diagram steps 5–6: the agent submits the Contract ID the farmer received via SMS. NIB validates it against the farmer's pending contract and marks it **SIGNED**. Only after this can the loan be processed (step 6).

### Request Body
| Field         | Type   | Required | Description |
|---------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `farmer_id`   | string | Yes      | The unique farmer ID |
| `contract_id` | string | Yes      | The Contract ID from the SMS (`{{contract_code}}`) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Contract ID validated. Contract signed.",
  "farmerId": "FARMER-001",
  "status": "SIGNED",
  "signedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00.000Z"
}
```

### Errors
| Code | Meaning |
|------|--------|
| 404  | Invalid Contract ID for this farmer |
| 409  | Contract already signed / not pending |

Initiate a loan request for a registered farmer. **Requires a SIGNED loan contract (steps 4–5)** — otherwise the request is rejected with 403. On success an OTP is sent to the farmer's registered phone number via SMS.

### Request Body
| Field        | Type   | Required | Description |
|--------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `farmer_id`  | string | Yes      | The unique farmer ID (from registration) |
| `product_id` | string | Yes      | The product/loan-purpose ID assigned during registration |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "OTP sent to farmer's registered phone number.",
  "requestId": "clxyz...",
  "expiresAt": "2026-03-27T12:05:00.000Z",
  "smsSent": true
}
```

> **Note:** The `requestId` is required for the OTP confirmation step. The OTP expires in **5 minutes**.

response.name: 201 - OTP Sent
403 - Signed Contract Required
404 - Farmer Not Found

request.description:
Verify the OTP, then NIB **automatically** disburses the loan and notifies Lersha.

### What happens on success
1. OTP is verified and a `referenceNo` is assigned
2. Loan is auto-disbursed (borrower, loan record, journal entries)
3. NIB calls Lersha `POST /api/v1/nib/disbursement-confirmation` with:
   ```json
   { "farmer_id": "FARMER-001", "remaing_balance": 50000 }
   ```
   (`remaing_balance` is the field name in Lersha's API; value is the farmer's `requestedLoanAmount` rounded.)

### Request Body
| Field                       | Type   | Required | Description |
|-----------------------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `uniqueRequestIdentifier`   | string | Yes      | The `requestId` from step 6 |
| `otp`                       | string | Yes      | 6-character OTP from SMS |

### Response (200) – full success
```json
{
  "message": "OTP verified and loan disbursed successfully.",
  "referenceNo": "REF1711540200-A1B2C3D4",
  "status": "DISBURSED",
  "disbursement": {
    "success": true,
    "message": "Loan disbursed successfully",
    "loanId": "clxyz...",
    "remainingBalance": 50000,
    "lershaNotified": true
  }
}
```

### Response (200) – OTP ok, disbursement failed
```json
{
  "message": "OTP verified successfully, but loan disbursement failed.",
  "referenceNo": "REF...",
  "status": "OTP_VERIFIED",
  "disbursement": {
    "success": false,
    "message": "No active agriculture LoanProduct found...",
    "lershaNotified": false,
    "error": "NO_AGRICULTURE_PRODUCT"
  }
}
```

### Error Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|--------|
| 401  | Invalid OTP |
| 404  | Loan request not found |
| 409  | OTP already verified |
| 410  | OTP expired |

response.name: 200 - OTP Verified and Disbursed
200 - OTP Verified, Disbursement Failed
409 - Already Verified
410 - OTP Expired

request.description:
**Optional — not required in the normal flow.**

Step 7 already auto-disburses the loan and notifies Lersha via `POST /api/v1/nib/disbursement-confirmation`. Use this endpoint only for **manual retry or reconciliation** when auto-disbursement succeeded locally but Lersha was not notified (`lershaNotified: false`), or when re-sending confirmation with an updated balance.

### Request Body
| Field               | Type   | Required | Description |
|---------------------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `farmer_id`         | string | Yes      | The unique farmer ID |
| `remaining_balance` | number | Yes      | Remaining loan balance (NIB maps to Lersha `remaing_balance`) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Disbursement confirmed and Lersha notified.",
  "loanRequestId": "clxyz123abc",
  "remainingBalance": 50000,
  "lershaNotified": true
}
```

> Set collection variable `remaining_balance` from step 7, or enter a number manually.

response.name: 404 - No Approved Loan

request.description:
Lersha submits insurance payment requests for one or more farmers.

For each farmer ID, NIB looks up the **Insurance** loan purpose captured during registration (`loanPurpose = "Insurance"`, priced by `totalCost`) and records a reviewable insurance payment with status `REQUESTED`. An admin then reviews and approves these on the NIB portal (single or bulk); approval books the loan and credits the configured insurer account, after which NIB calls Lersha `POST /api/v1/nib/insuranceConfirmation` with the result.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `farmerIDs` | string[] | Yes | List of farmer IDs to request insurance payment for |

```json
{
  "farmerIDs": ["FARMER-001", "FARMER-002", "FARMER-003"]
}
```

### Success Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Success",
  "data": {}
}
```

### Error Responses
| Code | Message | Meaning |
|------|---------|---------|
| 400 | `Invalid request` | Body failed validation (e.g. empty `farmerIDs`) |
| 400 | `No insurance records found` | None of the farmers have an insurance loan purpose to bill |
| 500 | `Failed to fetch farmers` | Unexpected error resolving farmers |

> Idempotent: farmers that already have a `REQUESTED`/`SUCCESS` insurance payment for the same purpose are skipped and the request still returns `200`.
> If a farmer's insurer is not yet mapped under Insurance Accounts, the payment is still recorded; the admin must configure the mapping before it can be approved.
